transcript.text:
[July, when the real heat starts]
[Highest level of discomfort]
Hot foods for hot days Need to eat some Samgyetang
[Samgyetang (Ginseng Chicken Soup)] This place is so famous
[With 32 years of tradition]
[Jiho Hanbang Samgyetang]
[This will heal the body]
[That tenderness...!]
[It just melts...!]
I love it Really
[A hot Summer day]
Hello everyone
[Gyeonggi, Guri-si]
I'm here to eat Samgyetang to nourish my body
It's starting to get hot And it's Boknal soon (dog days of summer)
You must eat some Samgyetang to prepare for the heat

Everyone knows about this chain because it's so famous (80 locations across the country)
They've been around for 32 years
I've always heard of it, but never tried it
It'd be nice to bring your family here
It's too hot I need to head inside
I like AC
Hello~
[Crowded]
So many people here
I think it's my first time doing a Samgyetang mukbang
[Menu]
There are so many different types of samgyetang 10 of them
People usually get full after 1 bowl
But for you...
Maybe 2~3 bowls
Well then... 1 order of Beauty (good for women),

1 Spicy, 1 Black Garlic,
1 Duck and Chicken Breast Tteokgalbi (Grilled Patties),
1 Duck Soup, and Spicy Chicken Feet, please
That's a good 7~8 servings of food
With that much Samgyetang, you'll be able to endure this Summer's the heat with no problem
[They have a patent for their signature broth]
[Preparing for the meal]
This is a little important...
This is called "Life Shot" (ginseng alcohol) And it's served before the meal
-It's alcohol? -Yes, that's right
A total of 48 hours to make the ginseng extract used for the alcohol
We also make this fresh ginseng kimchi every morning
And also our signature dish, seasoned garlic
The smell of ginseng
The taste of ginseng is very bold
And the alcohol is not too strong, So I think those who can't drink alcohol can also enjoy this

I like how this is served before the meal
[Let's get it started...]
Beauty Samgyetang
Spicy Samgyetang
Black Garlic
Duck, Chicken Breast Tteokgalbi
Spicy chicken feet
[Something big is coming...]
[Duck Soup with herbs (gastrodia elata)]
Thank you
[Gastrodia Elata Porridge]
[Must get that on camera]
[She can do it VS She can't do it]
[Let's eat]
Healthy eats
Let's start with Samgyetang first since it's what they're known for

This is the Beauty one
Popular dish
I noticed right away that
The soup is so thick
Look at the thin layer it's creating
That shows how thick the broth is
It already looks delicious
It was cooked for a long time That stickiness
That's so savory
Savory and also refreshing
Look how it just rips off
It must be so soft
A little bit of salt
The bones right off So soft
The chicken meat is sticky
And the meat is so tender

It just melted and disappeared
They used goji berries and licorice I heard it's really good for the skin
Next, This was highly recommended
Tteokgalbi (grilled patties) made with duck and chicken breast
Moist x4
That's really good
This...
This goes really well with Samgyetang
This is how you use chicken breast
Sticky rice
Get the chicken breast
Chicken breast is tender
Chewy
So good
Sticky rice
I love this

Really good
[She's good at eating...]
Get some chicken breast
This is their fresh ginseng kimchi
So delicious
It's this tasty and it's good for the skin?
Even the garlic is yummy
Spicy one
It's called "spicy" but it's not red I thought it would be red
[Wow]
This is a hangover cure
I can't just end with 1 spoonful
It's my first time trying spicy samgyetang that's not red
Drumstick with chives
Has it always been this easy to get the bones out?
The chicken itself is pretty spicy too

Refreshing too 1 bowl of this would get you sweat everything out
1 bite of the wing
That's no joke
There's a reason why they're famous
Chicken is so tender
Put it on top
Garlic
Get the whole leg
The meat is insane
Pasture-raised for 40~50 days
Less grease and cholesterol because they exercise a lot
Very tender too
I'll try this first Duck
This is a lot of food What's in here? What's this?
That's good? What is this?
That's Gastrodia Elata

They're often referred to as gems from the soil It will do wonders
It has a big piece of ginseng as well
Cooked for 12 hours with all kinds of herbs
Wow, this is no joke
Really deep flavors
Samgytang is white broth
Whereas this is clear Almost like mushroom soup
It's a little spicy, but it's a good feeling
Doesn't make me uncomfortable at all
Duck meat can be this tender?
Look how it just rips off This is no joke
[The meat rips right off]
The meat is not tough
Chewy breast meat
This part of the meat is so soft that it just melts
Even the cartilages are soft

Doesn't feel like a cartilage
What is this? What's a branch doing in here?
You're not supposed to eat that
Oh, I know I know
I don't eat everything on sight
I don't just eat whatever
They also have spicy chicken feet
Their chicken feet is good too
Perfect to pair it with the ginseng shot
Great with alcohol
Some porridge
Since I had spicy chicken feet I think they will go well together
Porridge tastes so good
There's a chestnut
It's been a while since I had it like this It's good!
[Not saying a word again...]

Black garlic I haven't had it yet
[Black Garlic Samgyetang]
Look at the thin layer This is literally the extract
The garlic flavor is not too strong It's definitely there though
Sweet too
Cut this in half
[Filled with sticky rice]
A bite of the drumstick
It's really pretty sweet
This must be the black garlic flavor
Some chicken feet here and there
Should I eat this too?
To cool down the spiciness
The elders enjoy eating Samgyetang
But kids would enjoy this one too
I can't let it go after taking a bite

Let's get some herbs out
I hate jujube
Get a big piece
This is the Spicy Samgyetang They reheated it for me
Let's get to work
[Debone in process]
If I had to choose 1, I would pick the Beauty
Is this why people eat this during Summer?
Because the wind feels cooler if your body is hot
[And the rest of the porridge]
[Let's speed it up]
I just thought of it
Since these are both duck, I think it'll be good to mix and cook together
But before that,
Let's eat some of this
That's so thick

All that extract
Thick and deep flavors
Take the duck
[Shred the meat]
And some of the broth
[Finished]
While we wait
This is crazy!
This is a real porridge
Cool down a bit
I should eat this like that too
Chicken skin
[Let's switch you out]
Today's chicken porridge...
I haven't had this much chicken porridge since I graduated high school
I used to eat the whole pot by myself

You can only get this kind of porridge after you make samgyetang
This is the best meal I had this year
No greasiness It's flavorful
But it's very refreshing too
Tastes great with the seasoned whole garlic
She's really good at eating
It's great that she's enjoying the meal
She's the best!
Last bowl of the black garlic
Let's try this now
It's gonna be so hot Let's eat some tteokgalbi
Let's try the black garlic porridge
This is really...
Strong flavors
The black garlic scent
So tasty

[Where did all the food go?]
Only 1 bowl of porridge left
[Spills]
[She's done it again]
[Whatever, just eat!]
How was it?
It was very delicious
This is a dessert tea called Jehocha
It's a traditional herbal tea that the royals enjoyed back in Joseon Dynasty on Dano (holiday)
As if I'm a King
Come hither
Enjoy
I've been curious What is that over there?
Samgyetang for pets
Really?
I wanna buy some for my cats

[Let's take a look]
[Hypoallergenic and nutritional human-grade samgyetang for pets!]
Give some to Jingu (her cat)
I feel bad for my cats every time I do mukbang at home
They're going to love it
[It's my time to feast]
[More dessert]
We sell this here It's black sesame ice cream
This is a perfect dessert to have after eating samgyetang
[Something else is coming...]
-There's more? -This isn't for you to eat here
This is the seasoned whole garlic
Oh this, from earlier It was delicious
Here's also a bottle of the ginseng alcohol that you had before the meal
-Take them home and enjoy -Thank you
Summer is about to start and also dog days of summer soon

Everyone should enjoy a bowl of samgyetang to nourish the body
This is actually a very nutritional meal for all year round, not just for Summer
Thanks everyone!
Dear subscribers, Be careful of the Summer heat and have a healthy & delicious holiday! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
